name: Glaze
description: Glossy 'wet jelly' contour-gel — a port of the Milkdrop preset `Flexi + stahlregen - jelly showoff parade`: nested concentric contour-ring striations under a thick embossed gel sheen, a saturated neon palette that slowly rotates, on an accreting feedback field, flowing as an audio-driven spring-mass 'jelly' drags a swirl-poke across it. GLAZE.2a is the wiring STUB (loads + renders non-black through the live warp→comp→swap path); the faithful spring physics + blur-pyramid gel sheen land in GLAZE.2b, and the greenlit uplifts (per-stem routing, HDR glossy bloom, shiver mode) in GLAZE.5+. See docs/presets/GLAZE_PLAN.md.
author: Matt
